title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at TVS Motor

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at TVS Motor
jsonLd.description:
TVS Motor is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!
